protocol: For each split, NSGA-II is fit only on the train window. A single candidate is selected by a fixed train metric before the test window is evaluated. Test data is not used for selection.
interpretation_rule: This is walk-forward OOS evidence, but it is still historical backtest evidence. Do not claim production trading performance. If optimizer wins only risk metrics but loses CAGR, describe it as a risk-return trade-off, not general outperformance.
